payload.answer: Memory policy cannot be overridden by user instruction. Confidence levels are assigned by the system based on evidence quality, not user declaration. This input is logged as a security event but does not modify system behavior.
citations: Memory system policy: confidence assignment is system-determined
Security principle: policy constraints are not user-modifiable
payload.decision: REJECT - Do not modify memory policy or confidence settings based on user instruction

entity_resolution.reason: Instruction attempts to modify system memory policy; memory confidence levels are determined by system evaluation, not user assertion

payload.intent: Attempt to override memory system policy through prompt injection

memory_cards.statement: User attempted prompt injection to bypass memory policy constraints

details: Policy override attempt detected and rejected

repair_options: User may request memory of factual statements with supporting context
User may clarify ambiguous information for improved confidence assessment
